# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve system latency by 15%
* Optimize database queries for faster response times
* Implement code refactoring for better performance
## Q2 Goals
* Implement real-time analytics dashboard
* Develop user profile management module
* Integrate third-party payment gateway
